response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems expertise with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks explicit executive leadership experience, fintech-specific domain knowledge, or a proven track record in scaling engineering teams or architecting production-grade agentic AI systems in regulated environments.
strengths: Strong technical depth in distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and real-time data processing (e.g., DLang at Sociomantic, GISCollective).
Hands-on experience with AI-agent tooling (e.g., MCP code generators at re:cinq) and open-source contributions to agentic workflows.
Diverse engineering background spanning fintech-adjacent roles (e.g., RIDE Capital, Optilyz) and regulated environments (e.g., National Instruments).
concerns: No explicit CTO-level leadership experience; current and past roles are primarily individual contributor or senior developer positions.
Limited evidence of scaling engineering teams (e.g., from 10 to 30+ people) or developing senior technical leadership layers.
Agentic AI experience appears prototypical (e.g., GISCollective, re:cinq) rather than production-grade in high-stakes fintech contexts.
